creator: mitya@cabletv.dp.ua
text:
xf86-video-ati-6.14.1 produce black blank screen in gdm. Only mouse cursor is moving.
When I run twm, I see artifacts on window decoration.

This is my card:
vgapci0@pci0:1:0:0:	class=0x030000 card=0x22541787 chip=0x95981002 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'ATI Technologies Inc. / Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.'
    device     = 'ATI RADEON HD 3600 Series (RV630)'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
    cap 01[50] = powerspec 3  supports D0 D1 D2 D3  current D0
    cap 10[58] = PCI-Express 2 legacy endpoint max data 128(128) link x16(x16)
    cap 05[a0] = MSI supports 1 message, 64 bit 
ecap 000b[100] = unknown 1

Fix: 

1. Run all on amd64 platform
2. Put "DRI" "False" into xorg.conf
3. Use another card than Radeon HD 3650 (On my home machine, when I have Radeon HD 2600 XT - all work fine)
